message:
fix(search): reset loading state when clearing query

When debounced query becomes empty, setIsSearching was not being called
which could leave the loading spinner visible after clearing the search.

Also removes obsolete linter fixture snapshots.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
